title: Fix Dashboard page failing to load

requirements.text: Fix the Dashboard page (/dashboard) so it loads correctly in the deployed version. Investigate and resolve any runtime errors that prevent the page from rendering — this includes handling cases where the useGetStats hook returns undefined, null, or an error state, where backend getStats call fails or times out, or where the actor is not yet initialized when the Dashboard mounts. Add proper loading spinners and error boundary/fallback UI so the page always renders without crashing.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /dashboard no longer results in a blank page or crash in the deployed version
The Dashboard renders a loading state while stats data is being fetched
If the backend getStats call fails, the Dashboard shows a user-friendly error message instead of crashing
If stats data is undefined or empty, the Dashboard still renders gracefully with zero-state messaging
All stat cards, category breakdown, top posts lists, and year distribution sections render correctly once data is available

requirements.text: Audit the useGetStats hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure it correctly calls the backend getStats function using the anonymous actor from useActor, handles actor initialization delay (actor may be undefined on first render), and returns a stable loading/error/data structure compatible with React Query. Ensure the query does not throw an unhandled promise rejection if the actor is not yet ready.
acceptanceCriteria: useGetStats does not throw when actor is undefined or not yet initialized
useGetStats correctly calls getStats on the backend actor once it is available
The hook returns { data, isLoading, isError } in a shape usable by Dashboard.tsx
The query is enabled only when the actor is available (enabled: !!actor)

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts
Do not change the backend getStats function signature or return type
nonGoals: Adding new stats or metrics to the Dashboard beyond what already exists
Changing the visual design or layout of the Dashboard
